title: Xiaohongshu Style 3D Creator Profile Card AI
sourceTitle: Xiaohongshu Style 3D Creator Profile Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-quality 4:5 Xiaohongshu-style 3D creator profile card for 慢慢写作的人, presented as a warm handheld creator identity visual. Subject: A realistic hand holds a vertical 3D profile card; young adult female writer holding a notebook and pen sits on the rounded cutout edge with a notebook and pen, while the card text displays 慢慢写作的人, 把复杂的事讲清楚, and 写作 / 观察 / 复盘 as clean readable profile information. Scene: Warm desk environment with table lamp, books, mug, sticky notes, soft stationery details, and a cozy creator workspace atmosphere behind the floating profile card. Composition: Fixed 4:5 vertical composition: hand in foreground holding the card, large rounded profile card centered, rounded hollow cutout in the middle, miniature creator figure seated on the cutout edge, profile text arranged in clear sections, and warm desk props softly blurred behind. Signature Elements: Handheld 3D profile card, rounded hollow center, seated creator figure, notebook and pen, 慢慢写作的人, 把复杂的事讲清楚, 写作 / 观察 / 复盘, warm desk props, soft lamp glow, and premium creator-atmosphere finish. Style: Refined 3D illustration with premium creator-brand atmosphere, soft cinematic warmth, polished rounded surfaces, believable hand anatomy, clean card typography, and social-profile-card charm without using a real platform logo. Color Palette: Warm beige and milky white base, soft amber lamp highlights, muted brown desk neutrals, gentle cream card surfaces, dark readable text, and small red-orange social-card accents without real logo marks. Lighting: Soft cinematic desk-lamp lighting with warm highlights on the hand and card edges, gentle ambient shadows, and cozy creator-studio depth. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: 慢慢写作的人, 把复杂的事讲清楚, and 写作 / 观察 / 复盘 appear as short readable Chinese profile text; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
